title: eDNA Extraction from Buffer EtOH 100% Using DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
author: delphine.vanhaecke Vanhaecke

steps.title: Clean the laminar flow hood and...
steps.instruction: Clean the laminar flow hood and micropipettes with DNAZAP (solution 1 and 2) and rinse with ddH 2 O.

steps.title: Place disposable gloves, sleeves and 1
steps.instruction: Place disposable gloves, sleeves and 1.5ml sterilized tubes (as many as the number of samples to process + 1 negative extraction control) in the laminar flow hood and submit to UV light for 10 minutes.

steps.title: In the meantime, sterilize the tubes...
steps.instruction: In the meantime, sterilize the tubes containing the filters with bleach (10%). Let dry and then clean with Ethanol 70%.

steps.title: Beadbeat the tube with the filter (stored in EtOH 99
steps.instruction: Beadbeat the tube with the filter (stored in EtOH 99.9%) for 20s at 4.0M/S. Let tubes rest for 5min then beadbeat again.

steps.title: In the flowhood, remove the EtOH...
steps.instruction: In the flowhood, remove the EtOH buffer from the tube and pipet it in a new 1.5mL sterilized LoBind tube

steps.title: Centrifuge the LoBInd tube with EtOH...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the LoBInd tube with EtOH for 60 minutes at 8000rpm and 6°C (check if pellet has formed at bottom).

steps.title: Refill the tubes with the filter...
steps.instruction: Refill the tubes with the filter with EtOH and store at -80°C.

steps.title: In the flowhood, remove the supernatant...
steps.instruction: In the flowhood, remove the supernatant and let the pellet dry with the fan on for 30 min.

steps.title: Add 20µl proteinase K, 200µl PBS...
steps.instruction: Add 20µl proteinase K, 200µl PBS 1x, 200µl buffer AL to each pellet. Freshly prepare 5ml of PBS 1x from PBS10X (mix 500µl PBS10x with 4500µl nuclease free water).

steps.title: Vortex well
steps.instruction: Vortex well.

steps.title: Incubate samples at 56°C for two...
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 56°C for two hours in a thermoshaker at 600rpm.

steps.title: Vortex 15s
steps.instruction: Vortex 15s.

steps.title: In the flowhood, add 200 µl EtOH 100%
steps.instruction: In the flowhood, add 200 µl EtOH 100%.

steps.title: Mix by vortexing
steps.instruction: Mix by vortexing.

steps.title: Pipet the mixture (650 µl) into...
steps.instruction: Pipet the mixture (650 µl) into the DNeasy Mini spin column placed in a 2 ml collection tube. Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 1 min. Discard flow- through and collection tube.

steps.title: Place the DNeasy Mini spin column...
steps.instruction: Place the DNeasy Mini spin column in a new 2 ml collection tube, add 600 μl Buffer AW1, and centrifuge for 1 min at 8000 rpm. Discard flow-through and collection tube.

steps.title: Place the DNeasy Mini spin column...
steps.instruction: Place the DNeasy Mini spin column in a new 2 ml collection tube, add 600 μl Buffer AW2, and centrifuge for 3 min at 14,000 rpm to dry the Dneasy membrane. Discard flow-through and collection tube.

steps.title: Place the DNeasy Mini spin column in a clean 1
steps.instruction: Place the DNeasy Mini spin column in a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge LoBIND tube, andpipet 75 μl Buffer AE directly onto the DNeasy membrane. Incubate at room temperature for 1min, and then centrifuge for 1 min at 8000 rpm to elute.

steps.title: Repeat step 18 in a new 1
steps.instruction: Repeat step 18 in a new 1.5 ml microcentrifuge LoBIND tube for a 2nd elution.

steps.title: Discard spin column and store eDNA samples at -20C
steps.instruction: Discard spin column and store eDNA samples at -20C.
